121.reason: No handling for unclosed /* comment: when the for-loop ends without finding a closing */, the variable i is not updated, causing the outer loop to process the same '/' again, leading to an infinite loop or incorrect scanning.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  No handling for unclosed /* comment: when the for-loop ends without finding a closing */, the variable i is not updated, causing the outer loop to process the same '/' again, leading to an infinite loop or incorrect scanning.

218.reason: [StringIndexOutOfBoundsException occurs when j reaches the last index (length-1), because j+1 exceeds the string bounds. A boundary check j + 1 < length is required before accessing the character.]
